name: atlas-blob-compute-smoke-lighting
description: E5 Phase 7e+ — Lambert + hemispheric ambient lighting using existing 3-tap forward-difference normal. Hit pixels write a properly-lit color (diffuse × NdotL + ambient × hemiBlend) instead of normal-as-color. Hardcoded gray (0.7) albedo until the material lookup ports. Pure arithmetic — no extra sceneSDF calls, no pipeline rebuild on toggle.
